John Hadaway About Projects About  Projects  Twitter↗︎  Linkedin↗︎  Email↗︎ 

A Real Space [SPIN Unit] [2022]
Helped launch A Real Space, located in the heart of Helsinki. Website↗︎

SPIN Unit's Website [SPIN Unit] [2022]
Built SPIN Unit's new website. Website↗︎

Estonian Shrinking Patterns [SPIN Unit] [2022]
Processed, analysed, and visualised building-level vacancy data for the Estonian Ministry of Economic Affairs. SPIN Unit↗︎

Analysis of the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park [SPIN Unit] [2021]
Analysed and visualised spatial data with Fyma AI to generate insights about the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park in London (LLDC).

Recentre Jyväskylä [SPIN Unit] [2021]
Helped organise a high-street community for the City of Jyväskylä. Analysed spatial data, facilitated an activation workshop, and built the community's website. SPIN Unit↗︎

The New Modal [SPIN Unit] [2020]
Proccessed and analysed spatial data, working with a GTFS feed, in order to map mobility equity for the City of Tallinn. SPIN Unit↗︎

HKU Guild [2020]
Designed key visuals and worked on other ad hoc design tasks for the HKU Guild.

The AArcade [2020]
Helped launch a (temporary) satirical outlet for students at the Architectural Association. Website↗︎

MetaNAR [SPIN Unit] [2019]
Co-designed and ran a workshop on mapping the digital footprint of Narva, Estonia, for the (Re)configuring Territories programme at the Narva Art Residency.

Art Map [2018]
Built an interface, in both React and Unity, for navigating a ConvNet's internal representations of an art collection. Github↗︎

Articulyze [2017]
Built a website dedicated to aggregating long-form journalism about the world's most acute humanitarian crises, as defined by the UNOCHA's annual report. Github↗︎
